description: Search scope boundaries for search-and-verify agents (e.g. Codex). Bounds WHERE to search, not WHEN to stop.

verification_shortcuts.cli/src/main.rs: top of file: Clap derive structs define all CLI commands and flags
verification_shortcuts.cli/src/agents.rs: fn redact_sensitive_text: all redaction regex patterns; detect_gemini_pb_fallback_hint + detect_cursor_vscdb_fallback_hint: NOT_FOUND enrichment probes
verification_shortcuts.cli/src/checkpoint.rs: fn run: checkpoint broadcast entry point; compose_state_message: default git-state message format

verification_shortcuts.scripts/conformance.sh: expect_success calls: lists all parity-tested commands
verification_shortcuts.scripts/test_agent_context.sh: check calls: lists all agent-context integration tests
verification_shortcuts.cli/src/main.rs: Agent enum: all supported agent names; Subcommand derive: all CLI commands

impact_analysis.derived_file_policy: Do not list fixtures/golden/*.json individually as change targets. They are regenerated by running conformance tests.

verification_shortcuts.cli/src/agent_context.rs: fn build_template_*: all template content functions; fn init: init flow; fn seal: seal flow with validation

verification_shortcuts.cli/src/agents.rs: fn read_session_codex/claude/gemini: per-agent JSONL parsing; fn redact_sensitive_text: redaction
